title: Lanpn 4 Pcs 12.5cm Outdoor LED Baubles, Large Christmas Battery Powered Ball Lights, Xmas Tree Sphere Bulb Decor with Dark Sensor, Christmas Lighted Ornaments for Lawn Garden Yard Patio, Red
features: 【Sparkling Holiday Decor】Add festive charm with these 12.5cm Christmas LED Baubles—perfect for outdoor, tree, or themed party décor. Their pulsing glow complements any seasonal style and impresses every guest

【Durable & Weatherproof Design】Crafted from shatterproof, UV-resistant plastic, these Christmas hanging light decor resist fading and damage—ideal for outdoor use year after year. Classics don't go out of style

【Dusk Sensor & Long Battery Life】Include an auto-on dusk sensor, these 4-pack Christmas tree lighted ornaments turn on automatically at dusk and glow for 8 hours—powered by 3 AA batteries (not included) and lasting over 45 days

【Easy to Hang & Display Anywhere】Each Christmas LED light includes a hanging string. No wires or outlets needed, it's flexible to hang in a variety of places—perfect for trees, patios, lawns, balconies, porches, or garden décor

【Versatile & Timeless Gift Idea】With classic seasonal appeal, these Christmas LED bulbs make a perfect holiday gift for family or friends—great for any festive outdoor space. Create a warm and sparkling winter holiday atmosphere

Battery Powered & Auto-On Powered by 3 AA batteries, no plugs needed. These hanging LED holiday ornaments light up at dusk and last 45 days—ideal for outdoor use. Easy to Hang Anywhere Each large outdoor Christmas ornament comes with a built-in string for quick and easy hanging, simple to place on tree, porch, or garden. Multiple Colors & Sizes Available in various colors and sizes, these light-up Christmas decor let you mix and match for different holiday style displays.
